since_last: 40% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.49%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC +2.15% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 -0.30%. 40% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.49%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.49%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.75%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +19.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +19.47%, VRT +6.16%, MU +5.76%, INTC +4.90%, PWR +4.42%. Laggards: SPCX -10.52%, AVAV -10.34%, ARM -6.91%, PLTR -5.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.52% at $165.53
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
